title: PluginCapabilities
description: Describes the declarative capabilities of a plugin, such as supported importers.

contentProviders.description: List of content providers provided by the plugin.

importers.description: List of supported modpack importers provided by the plugin.

updaters.description: List of supported modpack updaters provided by the plugin.

description.description: Optional detailed description of what this capability does.

handlers.description: Set of functions provided by the plugin to handle content operations.

icon.description: Optional icon file name or URL for the UI.

id.description: Identifier for the capability (lowercase, kebab/underscore allowed).

supportsInstallAtomic.description: Whether the provider supports installing individual items (e.g., a single mod or resource pack).

supportsInstallModpacks.description: Whether the provider supports installing complex modpacks or curated collections.

description.description: Optional detailed description of what this capability does.

fieldLabel.description: Optional field label shown in the importer UI.

handler.description: Plugin function name to handle this capability call.

icon.description: Optional icon file name or URL for the UI.

id.description: Identifier for the capability (lowercase, kebab/underscore allowed).

supportedExtensions.description: List of supported file extensions, e.g., ["zip", "mrpack"].

description.description: Optional detailed description of what this capability does.

handler.description: Plugin function name to handle this capability call.

icon.description: Optional icon file name or URL for the UI.

id.description: Identifier for the capability (lowercase, kebab/underscore allowed).

ProviderHandlers.description: Names of plugin functions that implement specific content provider logic.

checkCompatibility.description: Optional function to check if a specific content item is compatible with current environment.

getContent.description: Function to get detailed information about a specific piece of content.

installAtomic.description: Function to handle the download and installation of a single item.

installModpack.description: Optional function to handle the installation of full modpacks.

listVersion.description: Optional function to list available versions of a specific content item.

search.description: Function to search for content within the provider.
